labelBootstrapChecks.manualFollowUpDescription: Needs manual attention outside automated integration workflow

themes.name: gameplay-movement
notes: Do not merge #58 directly because it drags in audio and verification artefacts.

themes.name: gameplay-cheese
notes: This is the strongest coherent cheese branch and already includes docs.
#79 differs mainly by keeping cheese in the older pizza-and-coffee spawn flow.

themes.name: ux-accessibility
themes.recommendedTitle: 🎨🐀 Palette-Rat: Improve mobile instructions and icon accessibility (#63, #95)
notes: Keep #95 for semantic wrappers around icons and emojis.
#57 is distinct because it changes touch jump-plus-chew behaviour.
Treat #57 and #80 as changes-requested because they include noisy files.

themes.name: world-generation
notes: #61 is broader than #82 and is the preferred representative.
#82 should be folded into dormant third-level groundwork instead of the current route.

themes.name: audio-motifs
themes.recommendedTitle: 🎛️ Chord: Add district audio motifs and compression (#60)
notes: #60 is broader than #81 and is the preferred representative.
Merge after world-generation because both touch game state.
#81 should be folded into dormant third-level groundwork instead of the current route.

themes.name: verification
notes: These are additive test changes and can be merged together.

themes.name: docs-journal
themes.recommendedTitle: 📜🖋️ Archivist-Ink: Refresh controls docs and visual journal (#85, #86, #87)
notes: Prefer #87 over #64 for the visual journal update.

requiredFixesBeforeMerge.fix: Fold touch jump-plus-chew behaviour into the UX mega PR and drop root dependency churn plus stale test-results deletion.
Split or discard audio and verification artefacts; keep #62 as the movement baseline.
Move verification work into the repo test structure and drop generated PNG artefacts.
Rewrite commits so Jules is the primary author wherever that is not already true.
Port the ideas into dormant third-level scaffolding and keep that route disabled for now.

themeComparisonFindings.doubleJump: 62 is the best clean baseline; 56 is a narrower duplicate and 58 adds extra audio and verification files.
themeComparisonFindings.cheese: 94 is the strongest representative; 79 mainly differs by keeping cheese in the older collectible spawn flow, and the chosen direction is still 94.
themeComparisonFindings.paletteRat: 90, 93, and 95 converge on the same accessibility HTML outcome; 57 is being folded for touch behaviour and 80 remains a noisy verification branch.
themeComparisonFindings.audio: 60 is broader than 81 and becomes the preferred baseline, while 81 moves into dormant third-level groundwork.
themeComparisonFindings.tunneller: 61 is broader than 82 and becomes the preferred baseline, while 82 moves into dormant third-level groundwork.
